ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player (e.g., Point Guard, Power Forward) */,
  "height" TEXT /* Player's height in feet and inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Player's weight in pounds */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Player's date of birth */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Player's nationality */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "rookie_year" INTEGER /* Year the player started their NBA career */,
  "contract_start_year" INTEGER /* Year the current contract started */,
  "contract_end_year" INTEGER /* Year the current contract ends */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Player's current salary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to (e.g., Eastern, Western) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to (e.g., Atlantic, Central) */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "stadium_location" TEXT /* Location of the team's home stadium */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Team's primary and secondary colors */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the head coach */,
  "assistant_coach" TEXT /* Name of the assistant coach */,
  "general_manager" TEXT /* Name of the general manager */,
  "team_captain" TEXT /* Name of the team captain */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team that played the game */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the opponent team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Time the game was played */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season the game belongs to */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "tv_network" TEXT /* TV network that broadcasted the game */,
  "game_result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., Win, Loss) */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Points scored by the team */,
  "opponent_points_scored" INTEGER /* Points scored by the opponent */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Whether the game went into overtime */,
  "overtime_periods" INTEGER /* Number of overtime periods */,
  "game_summary_url" TEXT /* URL to the game summary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., 2022-2023) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "champion" TEXT /* Team that won the championship in the season */,
  "mvp" TEXT /* Most Valuable Player of the season */,
  "rookie_of_the_year" TEXT /* Rookie of the Year */,
  "coaches_award" TEXT /* Coach of the Year */,
  "season_summary_url" TEXT /* URL to the season summary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season the statistic belongs to */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player in the season */,
  "pts_avg" REAL /* Average points scored by the player per game in the season */,
  "reb_avg" REAL /* Average rebounds by the player per game in the season */,
  "ast_avg" REAL /* Average assists by the player per game in the season */,
  "stl_avg" REAL /* Average steals by the player per game in the season */,
  "blk_avg" REAL /* Average blocks by the player per game in the season */,
  "to_avg" REAL /* Average turnovers by the player per game in the season */,
  "fg_percentage_avg" REAL /* Average field goal percentage */,
  "tp_percentage_avg" REAL /* Average three-point percentage */,
  "ft_percentage_avg" REAL /* Average free throw percentage */,
  "efficiency_avg" REAL /* Average player efficiency rating */,
  "true_shooting_percentage_avg" REAL /* Average true shooting percentage */,
  "effective_field_goal_percentage_avg" REAL /* Average effective field goal percentage */,
  "turnover_ratio_avg" REAL /* Average turnover ratio */,
  "usage_percentage_avg" REAL /* Average usage percentage */,
  "pace_avg" REAL /* Average pace of the games */,
  "ortg_avg" REAL /* Average offensive rating */,
  "drtg_avg" REAL /* Average defensive rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player the award belongs to */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award (e.g., MVP, Rookie of the Year) */,
  "award_year" INTEGER /* Year the award was received */,
  "award_description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  "award_url" TEXT /* URL to the award details */,
  "award_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the award image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string of user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
